steps.title: Find the five-day total
steps.content:
At $900$ accounts per day, the number of accounts registered in the first $5$ days is
$$
900\cdot5=4{,}500
$$

steps.title: Write the fraction
steps.content: The fraction of the first $45{,}000$ accounts is $$ \frac{4{,}500}{45{,}000}=\frac{45}{450}=\frac{1}{10} $$ The answer is B.
